label: 掩码边缘提取
description: 轴向极值边缘提取：逐行取最左/最右非零格、逐列取最上/最下非零格，四类极值格取并集并保留原始数值。这是按行列扫描的极值边缘，不是形态学轮廓——凹陷部位与内部孔洞不会被勾勒。若需真正的形态学轮廓（8邻域边界），请使用「掩码轮廓提取」(mask_outline)。
description-en: Axis-extremal edge extraction: per row takes the leftmost/rightmost non-zero cell, per column takes the topmost/bottommost non-zero cell, then unions these extremal cells while keeping their original values. This is a row/column scan of extremal cells, NOT a morphological contour—concave regions and interior holes are not outlined. For a true morphological contour (8-neighborhood boundary), use Outline (mask_outline).
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。深色网格背景，边缘格用亮蓝色高亮显示，形成一圈轮廓线，内部格透明，突出边缘提取概念。主色深灰底配亮蓝，2种主色，简洁现代。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入二维整数网格，非零值视为有效区域
inputs.description-en: Input 2D integer grid; non-zero values are treated as valid regions.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 边缘网格
outputs.description: 与输入等尺寸，仅保留每行最左/最右、每列最上/最下的非零值，其余置0
outputs.description-en: Same size as input; retains only the leftmost/rightmost value per row and topmost/bottommost value per column; all other cells are set to 0.
